functional_audit.check: DashboardCheckinCard mounts in left-column ai_RNbBHXRX slot under dashboard grid (layout_notes)
Mood slider (ai_RNbBHXRk) and energy slider (ai_RNbBHXRo) update bound value text nodes reactively
checkin-submit-btn (ai_RNbBHXRw) triggers bTIqQ parity — persist DailyCheckIn fields (mood, energy_stress_level, reflection, date, user) via Supabase client
After submit, streak badge (ai_RNbBHXRf) refreshes from daily_check_in_streak_number with streak_days_number fallback
dailycheckin and user tables absent from supabase — API falls back to profiles.onboarding_data.daily_checkins with Bubble field keys

ui_evidence.notes: Group_card_ root with data-style-ref; vertical gap-4 form stack
Header row with title group and conditional streak badge
Group_badge_primary_ streak badge; hidden when streak is 0 or loading
Form column stacks mood, energy, reflection, submit per layout_notes
Mood label text with Text_label_ + primary color; parent nesting differs from IR (see C-1)
checkin-mood-value binds slider; aria-hidden duplicate of numeric mood
Slider handle_color hsla(188,52%,36%,1) matches IR; track uses var(--color_aiRNbAaxgw_default)
Energy slider shares mood slider IR handle styling
MultiLineInput_default_ reflection field with Bubble placeholder copy
Button_primary_ full-width Submit Check-In wired to submitDailyCheckIn

gaps: dailycheckin and user tables are absent from supabase migrations; checkinApi attempts dailycheckin insert then falls back to profiles.onboarding_data.daily_checkins
Streak computation is client-side simplified parity (yesterday continuation) rather than full Bubble bTIWG scheduled cancellation workflow
When dailycheckin table insert succeeds, computeNextStreak still derives from onboarding_data history only — streak may be wrong once the table is provisioned

critiques.finding: IR inventory places bTIXh (mood label) as a direct child of ai_RNbBHXRh, but the component nests bTIXh inside ai_RNbBHXRi alongside ai_RNbBHXRj — mood group hierarchy is flattened/reordered.
critiques.alternative: Move bTIXh to sit as a sibling of ai_RNbBHXRi under ai_RNbBHXRh to match Bubble parent_element_id chain.

critiques.finding: Streak badge (ai_RNbBHXRd) is not rendered while loading or when streak is 0; Bubble may always reserve badge chrome even at zero streak.
critiques.alternative: Render badge shell with 0 day streak during load/zero states, or defer hide until first successful fetch confirms zero.

critiques.finding: submitDailyCheckIn computes nextStreak from onboarding_data dates even when tryInsertCheckinTable returns true; existing dailycheckin rows are not queried, so streak will reset to 1 on consecutive days once the table exists.
critiques.alternative: On successful table insert, query dailycheckin dates for the user (or read user.daily_check_in_streak_number after tryUpdateUserStreakTable) before computing streak.

critiques.finding: End-to-end check-in persistence in the prototype depends on profiles.onboarding_data because dailycheckin is not provisioned in supabase — AC-3 table insert path is untested in this brownfield schema.
critiques.alternative: Land dailycheckin migration in supabase or document explicit QA seed for table-path verification.
